{"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","content":{"stdout":"=== ZOFFICE STACK: BUILT vs OPERATIONAL ===

✅ OPERATIONAL (deployed & running on va):
   • Daily Export Agent (9 AM ET) - librarian-export skill
   • API connection verified (ping works)
   • Audit DB on va side (N5/data/consulting_audit.db)

⏳ NEEDS INITIAL SEEDING (one-time push to zoputer):
   • Core skills bundle (security-gate, audit-system, etc.)
   • Folder structure (if not already there)
   • Audit DB schema on zoputer side

📋 NEEDS DEPLOYMENT ON ZOPUTER:
   • localization-maintainer scheduled agent
   • Audit logger script
   • Zoffice workers (Librarian, Consultant, Debugger)

🔌 OPTIONAL (not critical path):
   • Calendly webhook integration (D3.2 built, not wired)

==================================================
